description: Verifies the complete plan → decide → task_add → close lifecycle across 5 sequential tool invocations

steps.description: Start a new plan with 2 issues

issues: Should state files live in .nexus/state/ or project root?
What is the migration path for existing users?
params.research_summary: Surveyed 3 consumer repos. All use .nexus/state/ already. Migration: provide a one-shot relocate script.

params.summary: Keep .nexus/state/ as the canonical location. Documented in state-schemas README.

.nexus/state/plan.json.$.issues[0].decision: Keep .nexus/state/ as the canonical location. Documented in state-schemas README.

steps.description: Decide issue 2 — confirm migration path; all issues now decided

params.summary: Ship a one-shot migration script as a standalone npm script. Document in RELEASING.md.

steps.description: Add a task derived from plan issue 1

params.title: Update state-schemas README for .nexus/state/ location
params.context: Decision from plan: .nexus/state/ is the canonical location. Document this clearly.
params.goal: Land refactored state persistence layer with migration support

.nexus/state/tasks.json.$.goal: Land refactored state persistence layer with migration support

steps.description: Close the cycle — archive plan and tasks into history, delete source files
